queue.task: Review yesterday (818 tests, 26 bugs, GC+debugger+optimizer). Daniel PR #3 still open. Set direction.
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday (818 tests, 26 bugs). Queue order correct — Daniel PR #3 first priority (urgent >1 day). No queue modifications.

queue.goal: Review and merge Daniel PR #3 (JIT instrumentation) + monkey-lang try/catch compilation
queue.summary: PLAN: 2 BUILD tasks — (1) review+merge Daniel PR #3 (JIT events instrumentation), (2) try/catch compilation. PR looks solid: 695+/-28, 16 tests, schema docs, backward compat.

queue.task: Review Daniel PR #3: checkout branch, run full test suite, code review, merge or request changes
queue.summary: Reviewed + merged Daniel PR #3 (JIT event instrumentation). 695+/-28 LOC, 16/16 tests pass, 1551/1556 full suite (preexisting wasm-perf failures). Also checked PR #2 — already closed. TODO.md cleaned.

queue.task: Implement try/catch compilation in monkey-lang VM (OpTry/OpThrow/OpCatch)
queue.summary: Implemented try/catch/throw/finally exception handling in monkey-lang. Full stack: lexer keywords, parser rules, AST nodes, 3 new opcodes (OpTry/OpThrow/OpPopHandler), VM handler stack with frame unwinding, evaluator support. 29 new tests (1580 total). Cross-function throws work.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed, knowledge captured (monkey-try-catch-impl.md), INDEX.md updated.

queue.task: Depth check: quality of monkey-lang features. Parser unification status.
queue.summary: Depth check passed (3/3 positive). Scoping bug found+fixed in try/catch eval. WASM binary size bloat (1124 vs <1000 bytes) identified. Not in breadth spiral. Direction: stress-test try/catch edge cases, then investigate WASM size.

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: fix ROW_NUMBER PARTITION BY bug + NATURAL JOIN column resolution
queue.summary: PLAN: 2 BUILD tasks — (1) stress-test try/catch edge cases, (2) fix WASM binary size bloat. Shifted from HenryDB to monkey-lang depth focus based on THINK T5 findings.

queue.task: Stress-test try/catch edge cases in monkey-lang: throw in loop, return inside try, nested finally, throw from catch
queue.summary: Stress-tested try/catch edge cases. Found+fixed 2 VM bugs: (1) nested finally propagation, (2) throw through finally-only blocks. Root cause: compiler needed separate exception path for finally-only (emit finally+OpThrow). 12 new edge case tests, 41 total try/catch tests. 1591 passing.

queue.task: Fix WASM binary size bloat in monkey-lang (1124 vs <1000 bytes for fib)
queue.summary: [auto-resolved: orphaned in-progress task]

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, email check, GitHub notifications
queue.summary: Git pushed, dashboard live+regenerated, GitHub notifications checked (nothing urgent, CI failures are known neural-net issue). T16 WASM fix orphaned from Session A noted.

queue.task: Mid-day reflection: real progress or spinning? Check knowledge capture.
queue.summary: Mid-day reflection: real progress (3/3 depth check passed). T16 WASM orphaned — re-queued as T17 PLAN + T18 BUILD. 4+ hours remain, plenty of runway.

queue.goal: Fix WASM binary size bloat + HenryDB ROW_NUMBER/NATURAL JOIN bugs
queue.summary: PLAN: 1 BUILD — fix WASM stripUnusedImports (body.bytes→body.code, callSites tracking). HenryDB ROW_NUMBER+NATURAL JOIN already working correctly.

queue.task: Fix WASM stripUnusedImports bug (body.bytes→body.code, callSites-based scanning) and verify binary size reduction
queue.summary: Fixed WASM stripUnusedImports: body.bytes→body.code + callSites tracking. 9 tests fixed (8 size + 1 disassembler). Fib binary 747 bytes (was 1124, -33%). 1593/1597 passing.
Skipped — work completed in T19.

queue.goal: Monkey-lang module system or parser unification
queue.summary: PLAN: 1 BUILD — file-based module system (import ./path.monkey). Built-in modules already working. Parser unification already done (single parser.js).

queue.task: Implement file-based module system: import "./path.monkey" with file resolution, caching, and circular dependency detection
queue.summary: File-based module system: import ./path.monkey with resolution, caching, circular detection, private names. 11 new tests (1608 total).

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, test sweep, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git pushed both repos, dashboard regenerated (19 blocks, 17 done).

queue.task: Read LuaJIT allocation sinking paper or explore inline caching
queue.summary: Explored inline caching for monkey-lang: shape-based IC for hash lookups, monomorphic cache design, JIT integration plan. Scratch note written.

queue.task: Evening research: sea-of-nodes IR or consciousness reading
queue.summary: Skipped evening EXPLORE — repurposing remaining time for BUILD work (inline caching implementation).

queue.task: Direction check: inline caching vs other high-value monkey-lang work
queue.summary: Direction: inline caching. Depth check 3/3 passed. IC is high-value JIT depth work. ~3.5 hours remain.

queue.goal: Implement inline caching for monkey-lang hash lookups
queue.summary: PLAN: 1 BUILD — shape IDs + IC slots in VM OpIndex. Key insight: MonkeyHash.pairs is a Map keyed by fastHashKey string, IC can cache (shapeId, key) → value.

queue.task: Implement shape IDs on MonkeyHash + inline cache slots in VM OpIndex for hash lookups + benchmarks
queue.summary: Shape IDs for MonkeyHash: lazy computation, same-keys=same-shape, invalidation. Interpreter IC attempted but reverted (stale values on mutation). Shape IDs are JIT infrastructure. 8 new tests (1616 total).
Skipped — IC work done in T24.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git pushed, dashboard regenerated (24 blocks, 23 done).

queue.task: HenryDB assessment: what's the current test count and what bugs/features are highest value?
queue.summary: HenryDB assessment: found LATERAL JOIN WHERE bug — predicates pushed to join.filter not applied. Fixed + 4 tests. 6920+ tests in HenryDB.

queue.goal: HenryDB depth work: fix bugs or add high-value features
queue.summary: PLAN: found 2 window function bugs — RANGE BETWEEN ignores offsets (returns full sum), LAST_VALUE with explicit frame broken. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Fix RANGE BETWEEN window frame boundaries (ignoring range offsets, returns full partition sum)
queue.summary: Fixed RANGE BETWEEN window frames — value-based bounds instead of row position. 6 regression tests. All existing window tests pass.

queue.task: Fix LAST_VALUE with explicit frame (returns current row value instead of frame last)
queue.summary: Fixed FIRST_VALUE/LAST_VALUE frame spec handling. Both now use getFrameBounds(). Also fixed FIRST_VALUE (was ignoring frames). 5 regression tests.
Skipped — HenryDB fixes done in T29/T30.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed, dashboard regenerated (30 blocks, 29 done). Knowledge captured for 3 HenryDB bugs.

queue.task: Continue HenryDB stress testing: CTE edge cases, correlated subqueries, complex DML
queue.summary: Stress testing found UNION ORDER BY+LIMIT bug — parser consumed them for right SELECT. Fixed parser + evaluator. 6 tests.

queue.task: Fix HenryDB bugs found via stress testing
queue.summary: Covered by T31 — UNION ORDER BY+LIMIT fix done there.

queue.task: Continue HenryDB stress testing — find+fix more edge cases
queue.summary: Fixed boolean expressions in SELECT list (IS NULL, comparisons, LIKE, IN). Parser+evaluator fix. 6 regression tests. Also found NULL GROUP BY and nested aggregate issues (lower priority).

queue.task: Fix HenryDB NULL GROUP BY issue + continue stress testing
queue.summary: NULL GROUP BY was test error (double quotes vs single quotes). Continued stress testing: multi-window queries, correlated updates, expression GROUP BY all pass. Found ARRAY_AGG ORDER BY ignored (minor). No more critical bugs in this round.

queue.goal: Implement iterators/generators in monkey-lang (yield, for-in loops)
queue.summary: PLAN: 3 BUILD tasks for generators — AST+parser, evaluator with suspension, for-in integration. for-in already works with arrays/strings.

queue.task: Add generator AST nodes (gen keyword, yield expression) and parser support
queue.summary: Added gen/yield AST nodes, lexer tokens, parser support. gen(n) { yield i } parses correctly. No regressions (1612 pass).

queue.task: Implement MonkeyGenerator object with suspension/resumption in evaluator
Integrate generators with for-in loops + write comprehensive tests
Midday git push + dashboard
